info.title: BinkyLabs.OpenApi.Overlays.Cli
info.description: OpenAPI Overlays CLI - Apply overlays to OpenAPI documents

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: BinkyLabs OpenAPI Overlays CLI - Apply overlays to OpenAPI documents

commands.name: apply
commands.description: Apply one or more overlays to an OpenAPI document

options.name: --overlay
options.description: Path to overlay file(s). Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite output file without confirmation [default: False]

options.name: --strict
options.description: Treat targets that match zero nodes as errors instead of warnings [default: False]

arguments.name: input
arguments.description: Path to the input OpenAPI document

commands.name: apply-and-normalize
commands.description: Apply one or more overlays to an OpenAPI document, and normalize the output with OpenAPI.net

options.name: --overlay
options.description: Path to overlay file(s). Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite output file without confirmation [default: False]

options.name: --strict
options.description: Treat targets that match zero nodes as errors instead of warnings [default: False]

arguments.name: input
arguments.description: Path to the input OpenAPI document
